rulings.Case Title: HANIEL OLIVERA et al VS. KAUSHIK DATTANI et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Defendants Motion For Costs, Including Attorneys Fees
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, May 22, 2015, line 1. DEFENDANTs KAUSHIK DATTANI and 363 VALENCIA, LLC's Motion For Costs and Attorneys Fees Continued to June 24, 2015. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copies of the moving papers and reply to Department 501 no later than May 29, 2015 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ELLEN TSANG VS. CHARLES ENGELBERG et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION And Notice Of Motion Summary Adjudication
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, May 22, 2015, line 2. DEFENDANT CHARLES ENGELBERG's MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION OFF CALENDAR, moot. First Amended Complaint filed on April 30, 2015. The amended complaint furnishes the sole basis for the cause of action, and the original complaint ceases to have any effect either as a pleading or as a basis for judgment. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: COSTANZO BUZZELLI et al VS. MARY DEBENEDETTI, AS TRUSTEE FOR THE MARY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Deposition Of Nicholas Papageorge And Extend Discovery Cut Of On Ptsd Issue
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, May 22, 2015, line 3. DEFENDANT ADIL SHAIKH's Amended Motion To Compel Further Deposition Of Nicholas Papageorge And Extend Discovery Cut Of On PTSD Issue OFF CALENDAR. Moving party failed to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of the moving papers. The only courtesy copy received by Department 501 is a copy of an Amended Notice. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: TOY REAL ESTATE INVESTMENT COMPANY I, LLC VS. NANCY MATTINGLY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of And Motion For Order Reclassifying Action
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, May 22, 2015, line 5. PLAINTIFF TOY REAL ESTATE INVESTMENT COMPANY I, LLC's Motion For Order Reclassifying Action GRANTED. No opposition filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Trial By Jury
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, May 22, 2015, line 6. DEFENDANT MARION BUBLAVY's Motion For Trial By Jury DENIED. Defendant failed to provide sufficient notice per CCP 1005 and CCP 1013. Additionally Defendant's counter requests were properly rejected. The first counter request was filed before the Court received a Request to Set, i.e. was pre-mature. The Second counter request was not properly filled out as indicated in the Rejection Notices, i.e. incomplete. = (501/REQ)
